notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to second baseman Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.
